overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in wizard robes walking across a snowy stone bridge toward a gothic castle. The character passes through a dark archway into a courtyard with a central fountain, approaching the castle entrance. The environment features medieval architecture, snow-covered grounds, and overcast winter lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered stone bridge with gothic statues and railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the snowy bridge toward the castle gate, passing stone statues

notable_agents.action: two students in dark robes standing by the bridge railing
distant figure walking toward the gate

entered.detail: stone balustrades lining both sides of the bridge
tall spires and towers of the gothic castle rising in the distance
stone statues of cats perched on pillars along the bridge
snow-topped buildings visible on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide stone bridge covered in snow, flanked by stone railings and cat statues. The gothic castle towers rise in the distance against an overcast sky. Two students stand by the railing on the left as the character approaches the castle gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway with carved columns

events.description: entering the dark stone archway gate
ambient light dims significantly inside the stone passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark stone archway toward the light at the far end

notable_agents.action: distant student visible through the archway exit

entered.detail: massive stone archway forming the castle gate entrance
ornately carved stone columns lining the archway walls
glowing green magical lantern mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark stone archway, leaving the open bridge behind. The passage is lined with carved columns and illuminated by a green magical lantern. Light streams in from the distant courtyard exit as the character proceeds through the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with central fountain and formal gardens

events.description: exiting the archway into the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking across the courtyard toward the central fountain and castle entrance

notable_agents.action: student walking ahead toward the fountain

entered.detail: large tiered fountain in the center of the courtyard
snow-covered manicured hedges lining the courtyard paths
ornate stone lamp posts flanking the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the character enters a spacious courtyard with a central fountain and manicured hedges. The massive gothic facade of the castle dominates the view ahead. Other students walk through the snowy courtyard as the character approaches the fountain and main entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, snowy bridge into the enclosed depths of a stone passage before emerging into a grand castle courtyard. It begins with the character walking across a wide stone bridge flanked by cat statues, with gothic towers looming under an overcast sky. As the character reaches the gate, the scene shifts from the open air into a dark stone archway where carved columns and a green magical lantern illuminate the tunnel. The camera then follows the character toward a distant light, finally emerging from the passage into a spacious courtyard featuring a central fountain and manicured hedges. The view expands to reveal the massive gothic facade of the castle as other students move across the snowy grounds toward the main entrance.
